title: Cross-Roads
content:
Oft, as he jogs along the Winding-Way,
    Occasion comes for Every Man to say,--
    "This Road?--or That?" and as he chooses them,
    So shall his journey end in Night or Day.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham) delivers a powerful performance in "Cross-Roads"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
